description: CompositionHalf sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, with black, red and grey plaid checks, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, patch pocket on the left chest, full length buttoned placket with appliqued brand tab on the facing placket on the end and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this  black and red plaid check shirt from highlander. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
